HomeServicesFAQBlogStudioContact
contact@hive.com

Logos that build brands

Logo Design

A logo isn't just a pretty symbol — it's the face of your brand. It's often the first thing people see, and it influences how they perceive your business. Whether you're launching a startup, rebranding, or modernizing your look, a well-designed logo helps you stand out, build trust, and create recognition that lasts.

What you get

Custom logo design

Crafted to reflect your brand's unique story.

File deliverables

PNG, SVG, EPS, and PDF formats, optimized for web, print, and merchandise.

Usage guidelines

Simple rules to keep your logo consistent across platforms.

Logo Design process

Discovery

We get to know your brand, audience, and goals.

Research & Strategy

Market insight to find the right creative direction.

Concept Design

Multiple logo options, each exploring a unique idea.

Refinement

Fine-tuning color, typography, and details together.

Delivery

Final files and guidelines, ready to use anywhere

Featured work

Neobase

Nextdock

Scalar

Testimonials

I used to reply however I could and by night I still did not know what actually sold. A few weeks in, things were organized and we were closing in DMs almost daily.

Lucia M.

Creator | Spain

The best part for me was getting my time back. They handle chats all day and I can finally focus on filming instead of being glued to my phone.

Valentina R.

Creator | Mexico

I used to have one good week and two slow ones. After the retention and PPV changes, income became much steadier and the stress dropped a lot.

Mia K.

Creator | USA

I came in burned out from another agency that promised everything and delivered little. Here we review numbers weekly, keep what works, and fix what does not. No fluff.

Sofia T.

Creator | Argentina

My main fear was getting recognized in my city. They walked me through the privacy setup step by step, and I could scale without losing control of my account.

Noa P.

Creator Manager | LATAM

I used to reply however I could and by night I still did not know what actually sold. A few weeks in, things were organized and we were closing in DMs almost daily.
